SELECT
    EMP_CD,
    EMP_NM,
    SEX,
    BIRTHDAY,
    ENTRY_DATE,
    '2026-03-24'::DATE AS LOAD_DATE,
    'EMPLOYEE' AS RECORD_SOURCE
FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_RAW.EMPLOYEE

SELECT
    COMPANY_CD,
    COMPANY_NM,
    '2026-03-24'::DATE AS LOAD_DATE,
    'COMPANY' AS RECORD_SOURCE
FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_RAW.COMPANY

SELECT
    EMP_CD,
    ORG_CD,
    '2026-03-24'::DATE AS LOAD_DATE,
    'EMPLOYEE_ORGANIZATION' AS RECORD_SOURCE
FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_RAW.EMPLOYEE_ORGANIZATION

SELECT
    ORG_CD,
    ORG_NM,
    '2026-03-24'::DATE AS LOAD_DATE,
    'ORGANIZATION' AS RECORD_SOURCE
FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_RAW.ORGANIZATION

SELECT
    EMP_CD,
    COMPANY_CD,
    SALES_MONTH,
    SALES_AMT,
    '2026-03-24'::DATE AS LOAD_DATE,
    'SALES' AS RECORD_SOURCE
FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_RAW.SALES

-- Generated by AutomateDV (formerly known as dbtvault)

    

WITH source_data AS (

    SELECT

    ORG_CD,
    ORG_NM,
    LOAD_DATE,
    RECORD_SOURCE

    FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.raw_organization
),

derived_columns AS (

    SELECT

    ORG_CD,
    ORG_NM,
    RECORD_SOURCE AS RECORD_SOURCE,
    LOAD_DATE AS LOAD_DATE,
    LOAD_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_FROM

    FROM source_data
),

hashed_columns AS (

    SELECT

    ORG_CD,
    ORG_NM,
    LOAD_DATE,
    RECORD_SOURCE,
    EFFECTIVE_FROM,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(ORG_CD AS VARCHAR))), '')) AS BINARY(16)) AS ORGANIZATION_PK,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(ORG_NM AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^')) AS BINARY(16)) AS ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF

    FROM derived_columns
),

columns_to_select AS (

    SELECT

    ORG_CD,
    ORG_NM,
    RECORD_SOURCE,
    LOAD_DATE,
    EFFECTIVE_FROM,
    ORGANIZATION_PK,
    ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF

    FROM hashed_columns
)

SELECT * FROM columns_to_select

-- Generated by AutomateDV (formerly known as dbtvault)

    

WITH row_rank_1 AS (
    SELECT rr.ORGANIZATION_PK, rr.ORG_CD, rr.LOAD_DATE, rr.RECORD_SOURCE,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER(
               PARTITION BY rr.ORGANIZATION_PK
               ORDER BY rr.LOAD_DATE
           ) AS row_number
    FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.v_stg_organization AS rr
    WHERE rr.ORGANIZATION_PK IS NOT NULL
    QUALIFY row_number = 1
),

records_to_insert AS (
    SELECT a.ORGANIZATION_PK, a.ORG_CD, a.LOAD_DATE, a.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM row_rank_1 AS a
    LEFT JOIN S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.hub_organization AS d
    ON a.ORGANIZATION_PK = d.ORGANIZATION_PK
    WHERE d.ORGANIZATION_PK IS NULL
)

SELECT * FROM records_to_insert

-- Generated by AutomateDV (formerly known as dbtvault)

    

WITH source_data AS (
    SELECT a.ORGANIZATION_PK, a.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF, a.ORG_NM, a.EFFECTIVE_FROM, a.LOAD_DATE, a.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.v_stg_organization AS a
    WHERE a.ORGANIZATION_PK IS NOT NULL
),

latest_records AS (
    SELECT a.ORGANIZATION_PK, a.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF, a.LOAD_DATE
    FROM (
        SELECT current_records.ORGANIZATION_PK, current_records.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF, current_records.LOAD_DATE,
            RANK() OVER (
               PARTITION BY current_records.ORGANIZATION_PK
               ORDER BY current_records.LOAD_DATE DESC
            ) AS rank
        FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.sat_organization AS current_records
            JOIN (
                SELECT DISTINCT source_data.ORGANIZATION_PK
                FROM source_data
            ) AS source_records
                ON current_records.ORGANIZATION_PK = source_records.ORGANIZATION_PK
    ) AS a
    WHERE a.rank = 1
),

records_to_insert AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT stage.ORGANIZATION_PK, stage.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF, stage.ORG_NM, stage.EFFECTIVE_FROM, stage.LOAD_DATE, stage.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM source_data AS stage
    LEFT JOIN latest_records
    ON latest_records.ORGANIZATION_PK = stage.ORGANIZATION_PK
        AND latest_records.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF = stage.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF
    WHERE latest_records.ORGANIZATION_HASHDIFF IS NULL
)

SELECT * FROM records_to_insert

WITH stage AS (
    SELECT LINK_EMP_COMPANY_SALES_PK, EMPLOYEE_PK, COMPANY_PK, SALES_MONTH, SALES_AMT, EFFECTIVE_FROM, LOAD_DATE, RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.v_stg_sales
    WHERE LINK_EMP_COMPANY_SALES_PK IS NOT NULL
    AND EMPLOYEE_PK IS NOT NULL
    AND COMPANY_PK IS NOT NULL
),
records_to_insert AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT stg.LINK_EMP_COMPANY_SALES_PK, stg.EMPLOYEE_PK, stg.COMPANY_PK, stg.SALES_MONTH, stg.SALES_AMT, stg.EFFECTIVE_FROM, stg.LOAD_DATE, stg.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM stage AS stg
    LEFT JOIN S45969_DBT_DB.S45969_DBT_AH_SCHEMA.t_link_sales AS tgt
    ON stg.LINK_EMP_COMPANY_SALES_PK = tgt.LINK_EMP_COMPANY_SALES_PK
    WHERE tgt.LINK_EMP_COMPANY_SALES_PK IS NULL
)

SELECT * FROM records_to_insert
